description:

No Fee

name: Back Mountain Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Back Mountain Pickleball in Dallas, PA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The courts can be reserved.

name: Empower Sports Academy
description: Come play pickleball at Empower Sports Academy in Kingston, PA! There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Friedman JCC
description: Come play pickleball at Friedman JCC in Kingston, PA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Kingston Twp Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kingston Twp Park in Shavertown, PA! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Newberry Estate
description: Come play pickleball at Newberry Estate in Dallas, PA! There are 8 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Pittston Township Tony Attardo Park
description: Pittston Township Tony Attardo Park is a place to play pickleball in Pittston, PA. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Pittston YMCA
description: Pittston YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pittston, PA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, food, youth programming, and lights.

name: The Sidney and Pauline Friedman Jewish Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at The Sidney and Pauline Friedman Jewish Community Center in Kingston, PA! There are 4 wood courts. 1 is outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Wilkes-Barre Family YMCA
description: Wilkes-Barre Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wilkes-Barre, PA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
